events.title: Battle of Waterloo
events.description: A decisive battle reshaped European politics.

events.description: The suffrage movement gained a lasting legal symbol.

events.title: Appeal of 18 June
events.description: Charles de Gaulle called for French resistance from London.

events.title: Sally Ride in space
events.description: Sally Ride became the first American woman in space.

events.title: DNSSEC rollover preparation
events.description: Internet operators prepared for a major trust-anchor transition.
